Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp

Interface McpEndpoint

public interface McpEndpoint
Mixin interface that exposes an MCP JSON-RPC endpoint at POST /mcp on any Juneau REST resource.

Implementing classes provide their McpServerConfig by implementing getMcpConfig(); the default handleMcpRequest(JsonRpcRequest, RestRequest) method dispatches incoming requests through Mcp.handle(JsonRpcRequest, McpServerConfig, BeanStore).

Example:






    


  • 

    

    Method Summary
    

    

    

    

    

    Modifier and Type
    

    Method
    

    Description
    

    McpServerConfig
    

    getMcpConfig()
    

    

    Returns the McpServerConfig backing this endpoint.
    

    

    default JsonRpcResponse
    

    handleMcpRequest(JsonRpcRequest req,
 RestRequest restReq)
    

    

    Default MCP JSON-RPC endpoint handler.
    

    

    

    

    

    

    • 







    


  • 

    

    Method Details
    

      

    • 

      

      getMcpConfig
      

      McpServerConfig getMcpConfig()
      

      Returns the McpServerConfig backing this endpoint.
      

      

      Returns:
      

      The config. Never null.
      

      

      

      • 

    • 

      

      handleMcpRequest
      

      default JsonRpcResponse handleMcpRequest(@Content
 JsonRpcRequest req,
 RestRequest restReq)
      

      Default MCP JSON-RPC endpoint handler.

 
      
 Implementations may override this method to customize routing (path / annotations) but must still
 call Mcp.handle(JsonRpcRequest, McpServerConfig, BeanStore) to dispatch.
      

      

      Parameters:
      

      req - JSON-RPC request envelope.
      

      restReq - The current REST request.
      

      Returns:
      

      The response, or null for notifications.
      

      

      

      •
